_note: STUB CONTENT for wiring/demo only. Marketing session authors real copy. AdviceEntry = {title, summary, guidance, focus, do[], avoid[], rating}. FREE daily = the two-number model in 'freeDaily' below (universalDay single-number block is SUPERSEDED, kept for reference only). PAID daily = personalDay keyed by number ('1'-'9','11','22','33'), with lifePathOverlay[lifePath][personalDay] an optional partial merged over it (overlay fields win, base is the fallback).

freeDaily._note: Two-number model: dayOfMonth (pure 1-9) x universalDay (1-9, 11, 22, 33). Engine scores the pair with numerologyCompat, then classifies: score>=thresholds.synergyMin -> 'synergy'; >=flowMin -> 'flow'; else LOW, which splits editorially via lowSplit[pairKey] into 'trap' (default) or 'bestOfBoth'. Wording = classTemplates[class], optionally overridden by heroPairs[pairKey]. pairKey = '<dayOfMonth>x<universalDay>' e.g. '1x9', '3x11'. A single compat score CANNOT tell trap from bestOfBoth (both can be low), so lowSplit is where you encode Manuel's rule per pair.

synergy.title: In Sync
synergy.summary: [stub] The day's two currents pull the same way.
synergy.guidance: [stub] Day energy {dayOfMonth} and Universal {universalDay} reinforce each other - ride it.

flow.title: Workable
flow.guidance: [stub] Day {dayOfMonth} and Universal {universalDay} coexist fine - steady day.

trap.title: Matrix Trap
trap.summary: [stub] The two numbers pull against each other on the SAME move.
trap.guidance: [stub] Day {dayOfMonth} says one thing, Universal {universalDay} the opposite - the obvious impulse quietly misfires today. Don't force it.
do: Wait a day on the big move

bestOfBoth.title: Best of Both
bestOfBoth.summary: [stub] Two different lanes you can actually merge.
bestOfBoth.guidance: [stub] Day {dayOfMonth} and Universal {universalDay} live in different lanes - don't blend them, DO both deliberately.
do: Use each energy in its own lane
avoid: Trying to blend them into one

1x9.title: The Quiet Misfire
1x9.guidance: [stub hero] Day 1 begs you to start; Universal 9 is a closing energy. Starting today feels right and quietly fizzles - finish something instead.

1.title: Fresh Start
1.summary: A day the collective clock resets to one.
1.guidance: [stub] Universal 1 favors initiating over finishing. Plant, don't harvest.

2.title: Slow & Connect
2.summary: A cooperative, sensitive tone in the air.
2.guidance: [stub] Universal 2 rewards patience and partnership over force.

5.title: Change
5.guidance: [stub] Universal 5 favors movement and the unexpected.

6.title: Care
6.summary: Home, love and responsibility come forward.
6.guidance: [stub] Universal 6 rewards showing up for people.

8.title: Power
8.summary: Ambition, money and results are lit.

22.title: Master Build
22.guidance: [stub] Universal 22 supports turning a large vision practical.

1.guidance: [stub overlay] As a Life Path 7 on a Personal Day 1, begin quietly and on your own terms - a private start beats a public one.

8.guidance: [stub overlay] LP7 on a Personal Day 8: let your analysis, not hustle, drive the power move.

1.guidance: [stub overlay] LP9 on a Personal Day 1: begin something that also gives back - your fresh start lands best with a cause behind it.
